attacking_style: Rarely attacks for himself; functions as pace-setter/attacker to enable teammates or drain rivals (e.g., 17km before finish to enable counters). When winning, out-sprints small post-selection groups rather than initiating decisive moves.
team_tactics: Versatile domestique role: leadout work on uphill/technical finishes, triple-loading breakaways to neutralize chases, echelon formation presence. Teams deploy him as multi-purpose engine rather than protected finisher.
terrain_preference: Technical finishes requiring positioning intelligence and shallow gradients where recovery capacity matters. Performs well in post-cobbles selections and controlled sprints from small groups. Velodrome/power sprints expose relative lack of pure top-end speed.
vulnerability: Lacks finishing punch against pure sprinters in organized sprints; initiating too early from distance (velodrome sprint fade); struggles to follow explosive attacks on steep climbs despite strong positioning.
key_patterns: Functions as high-value leadout man rivals fight to follow, not protected sprinter (3 observations).
Recovery capacity underestimated: regains strength after cracking on gradients, strong after 50km suffering (4 observations).
Wins from small breaks/selections via positioning intelligence, not raw power sprints (3 observations).
Deployed tactically to drain breakaways or legitimize echelons before teammates counter-attack (3 observations).
Excels in uphill/technical sprint finishes requiring sustained threshold, not explosive power (4 observations).
form_trajectory: neutral: Recent observations show sustained leadout quality through technical courses (2023), but no personal results since 2022. Remains tactically valuable domestique rather than results-focused leader.
